message: docs: rebuild CHANGELOG.md from git history with live commit links

files.patch:
@@ -2,266 +2,363 @@
 
 All notable changes to the **Dicklesworthstone Scoop Bucket** are documented here.
 
-This repository has no tagged releases. Changes are tracked by commit. Manifest version bumps (auto-updates via GoReleaser or GitHub Actions) are grouped together; infrastructure and tooling changes are listed individually.
+This repository distributes Windows Scoop manifests for the [Dicklesworthstone Stack](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone) -- a suite of developer-productivity and AI-agent tools. There are no tagged releases; the history below is derived exhaustively from the 57-commit git log (2025-12-14 through 2026-03-21). Manifest version bumps produced by automation (GoReleaser bot, GitHub Actions) are grouped by date; infrastructure and tooling changes are described individually.
 
 Repository: <https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket>
 
 ---
 
-## 2026-03-15 — cass v0.2.2
+## Current Manifest Versions (as of 2026-03-21)
 
-### Manifest Updates
+| Manifest | Tool | Version | First Added | Update Method |
+|----------|------|---------|-------------|---------------|
+| `cass.json` | Coding Agent Session Search | 0.2.2 | 2026-01-13 | GitHub Actions auto-update |
+| `xf.json` | X-Former (Twitter/X Archive Search) | 0.2.0 | 2026-01-13 | GitHub Actions auto-update |
+| `cm.json` | CASS Memory System | 0.2.3 | 2026-01-13 | GitHub Actions auto-update |
+| `dcg.json` | Destructive Command Guard | 0.4.0 | 2026-02-09 | GitHub Actions auto-update |
+| `tru.json` | TOON encoder/decoder | 0.2.1 | 2026-01-24 | GitHub Actions auto-update |
+| `bv.json` | Beads Viewer | 0.15.0 | 2026-01-13 | GoReleaser |
+| `caam.json` | Coding Agent Account Manager | 0.1.10 | 2026-01-13 | GoReleaser |
+| `slb.json` | Simultaneous Launch Button | 0.2.0 | 2026-01-13 | GoReleaser |
+| `ntm.json` | Named Tmux Manager | 1.8.0 | 2025-12-14 | GoReleaser |
+
+---
+
+## Infrastructure Capabilities Timeline
+
+A chronological summary of when each major capability landed in the repository, independent of manifest version bumps.
+
+| Date | Capability | Commit |
+|------|------------|--------|
+| 2025-12-14 | Repository bootstrapped (ntm manifest via GoReleaser) | [`8397f9a`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/8397f9ae33c4a659d5b3241f4b79a576eeb7fae5) |
+| 2026-01-13 | CI test workflow: JSON validation, Windows install/uninstall cycle, version-drift detection | [`278b824`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/278b824f73234f7ed6668c629456670329eda376) |
+| 2026-01-13 | Automated manifest updates: `repository_dispatch`, 6-hour scheduled check, `update-manifest.sh` | [`68e7995`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/68e7995082f86d561884b55894166f339a7a0b02) |
+| 2026-01-13 | Comprehensive README: install guide, troubleshooting, maintainer docs, manifest structure | [`2f51d46`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/2f51d46c66ed489865427d84420599900a79a047) |
+| 2026-01-21 | MIT license added | [`ac4a8b3`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/ac4a8b33a00d5ca39f151dcf54bf2a2a2a97f9c2) |
+| 2026-01-24 | CI hardening: push permissions, concurrency guards, retry-with-rebase | [`3fb7e79`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/3fb7e791ecf7b88dae6e64882500e51472875a4c) |
+| 2026-02-08 | Unit test framework: assertion library, mock infrastructure, structured JSON logging | [`b8603d2`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/b8603d2f11e4640816ef1617db0b70ec5d4fb19a) |
+| 2026-02-08 | 18 unit tests / 37 assertions for `update-manifest.sh` | [`be434c5`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/be434c53131731a3702c48d248c7ccc0689839df) |
+| 2026-02-09 | Installation verification scripts (PowerShell + bash) and weekly CI workflow | [`a35b4ee`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a35b4ee15f70c99cce7e3f883dbec58d2453d350) |
+| 2026-02-09 | Recovery/rollback runbook (`docs/RECOVERY.md`) | [`239a053`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/239a053c093e34202b7a93629ec8a0131b4880b4) |
+| 2026-02-21 | License updated to MIT with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider | [`c0829ed`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/c0829ed25160548af32e36ca84f2ee43edb50431) |
+| 2026-02-21 | GitHub social preview image | [`8edcbc4`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/8edcbc4c6a4ebec2b41cc8a991124601ead91875) |
+

-## 2026-02-09 — Installation verification, dcg manifest, test expansion, PS 5.1 fixes
+### 2026-02-09 -- dcg manifest added, verification scripts, PS 5.1 compat, docs
+
+A large day of infrastructure work: the dcg manifest was introduced, an end-to-end installation verification pipeline was added, PowerShell 5.1 compatibility bugs were fixed, and operational recovery documentation was written.
+
+**New manifests**
 
-### New Manifests
+- **dcg** (Destructive Command Guard) added at v0.3.0 -- [`7ab8927`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/7ab89275953ab4d76d340ffe3522ec962266f785)
 
-- **dcg** (Destructive Command Guard) added at v0.3.0 — [`7ab8927`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/7ab89275953ab4d76d340ffe3522ec962266f785)
+**Installation verification (new capability)**
 
-### CI / Infrastructure
+- Add `scripts/verify-installation.ps1` (PowerShell): full Scoop install/version/uninstall lifecycle testing on Windows -- [`a35b4ee`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a35b4ee15f70c99cce7e3f883dbec58d2453d350)
+- Add `scripts/verify-installation.sh` (bash): manifest JSON structure validation and URL reachability checks for non-Windows CI -- [`a35b4ee`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a35b4ee15f70c99cce7e3f883dbec58d2453d350)
+- Add `.github/workflows/verify-installation.yml`: weekly Windows verification workflow -- [`a35b4ee`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a35b4ee15f70c99cce7e3f883dbec58d2453d350)
 
-- Add installation verification scripts: PowerShell for Windows install lifecycle testing, bash wrapper for manifest JSON validation and URL reachability, plus a GitHub Actions workflow for weekly verification — [`a35b4ee`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a35b4ee15f70c99cce7e3f883dbec58d2453d350)
-- Add dcg and tru to auto-update workflow matrix — [`8b405b1`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/8b405b16c5900e1f48c07817e08692747ce078b0)
+**CI / automation**
 
-### Bug Fixes
+- Add dcg and tru to the auto-update workflow matrix and `update-manifest.sh` tool list (GoReleaser-managed tools excluded as they self-push) -- [`8b405b1`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/8b405b16c5900e1f48c07817e08692747ce078b0)
 
-- Fix PS 5.1 compatibility: hashtable literal and empty array safety — [`7b06e71`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/7b06e716cfd1cede1cd8f8ef03247b1c6f752630)
-- Fix PS 5.1 compatibility: if-expression assignment pattern — [`1178e7a`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/1178e7a90bf8bbf0092726dfc0667c9569bd9f35)
-- Correct usage comment in verify-installation.ps1 — [`a623b2b`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a623b2b28ff11d5265a583ae261d9b0006a9a0a8)
+**Bug fixes**
 
-### Documentation
+- Fix PS 5.1 compatibility: hashtable literal syntax and empty-array safety in `verify-installation.ps1` -- [`7b06e71`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/7b06e716cfd1cede1cd8f8ef03247b1c6f752630)
+- Fix PS 5.1 compatibility: if-expression assignment pattern -- [`1178e7a`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/1178e7a90bf8bbf0092726dfc0667c9569bd9f35)
+- Correct usage comment in `verify-installation.ps1` -- [`a623b2b`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a623b2b28ff11d5265a583ae261d9b0006a9a0a8)
 
-- Add rollback and recovery procedures (docs/RECOVERY.md): manifest revert, hash fixes, version pinning, emergency deprecation, bucket reset, user diagnosis, prevention checklist, post-incident template — [`239a053`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/239a053c093e34202b7a93629ec8a0131b4880b4)
-- Update README: add all available tools, remove Coming Soon section — [`1b6318e`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/1b6318e4e79bc19d9e403f9b4e6c3cf9c12b052c)
+**Documentation**
 
-### Manifest Maintenance
+- Add `docs/RECOVERY.md`: rollback and recovery runbook covering manifest revert, hash fixes, version pinning, emergency deprecation, bucket reset, user-reported-issue diagnosis, prevention checklist, and post-incident template -- [`239a053`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/239a053c093e34202b7a93629ec8a0131b4880b4)
+- Update README: list all available tools (bv, caam, slb, ntm, dcg, tru), remove Coming Soon section, update directory structure and source repo table -- [`1b6318e`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/1b6318e4e79bc19d9e403f9b4e6c3cf9c12b052c)
 
-- Update tru.json asset URL, exe name, and description for tru-to-toon binary rename — [`06d5d26`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/06d5d261d5a99d0298dcb8f85b13c39f00744628)
+**Manifest maintenance**
+
+- Update `tru.json` asset URL, exe name, and description for the tru-to-toon binary rename -- [`06d5d26`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/06d5d261d5a99d0298dcb8f85b13c39f00744628)

-## 2026-02-08 — Unit test framework
+### 2026-02-08 -- Unit test framework (new capability)
 
-### CI / Infrastructure
+**CI / testing**
 
-- Add unit test framework: test-helpers.sh (assertion library with equals, contains, file_exists, json_field, etc.), test-runner.sh (suite filtering, structured JSON logging), and mock infrastructure for curl/git — [`b8603d2`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/b8603d2f11e4640816ef1617db0b70ec5d4fb19a)
-- Add comprehensive unit tests for update-manifest.sh: 18 tests, 37 assertions covering all 3 tool paths (cass, xf, cm), version handling, architecture-specific and simple manifest updates, JSON validity, field preservation, idempotency, and error messages — [`be434c5`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/be434c53131731a3702c48d248c7ccc0689839df)
+- Add unit test framework: `scripts/test-helpers.sh` (assertion library with equals, contains, file_exists, json_field, etc.), `scripts/test-runner.sh` (suite filtering, structured JSON logging), and mock infrastructure for curl/git -- [`b8603d2`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/b8603d2f11e4640816ef1617db0b70ec5d4fb19a)
+- Add comprehensive unit tests for `update-manifest.sh`: 18 tests, 37 assertions covering all 3 tool paths (cass, xf, cm), version handling, architecture-specific and simple manifest updates, JSON validity, field preservation (checkver, autoupdate, bin, rename fragments), idempotency, and error messages -- [`be434c5`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/be434c53131731a3702c48d248c7ccc0689839df)

-## 2026-01-13 — Initial bucket infrastructure, cass/xf/cm/caam/slb/bv manifests
+### 2026-01-13 -- Foundational build-out
+
+This date marks the transformation of the repository from a single GoReleaser-managed manifest into a fully-featured Scoop distribution channel for the Dicklesworthstone Stack. Six new manifests were introduced, CI testing and auto-update pipelines were created, and comprehensive documentation was written -- all in a single day.
+
+**New manifests**
 
-This is the foundational build-out of the Scoop bucket as a proper distribution channel for the Dicklesworthstone Stack on Windows.
+- **cass** (Coding Agent Session Search) added at v0.1.55 -- [`dcfe55f`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/dcfe55f94b29b5ac517b84599845f65c78aaa69f)
+- **xf** (X-Former / Twitter Archive Search) added at v0.2.0 -- [`dcfe55f`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/dcfe55f94b29b5ac517b84599845f65c78aaa69f)
+- **cm** (CASS Memory System) added at v0.2.3 -- [`51c6d80`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/51c6d808694410cf3c81071612475a18bf3b60a2)
+- **caam** (Coding Agent Account Manager) first seen at v0.1.2 via GoReleaser -- [`5f96767`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/5f96767f21f58e1b5d5c6a6311b230018b663aff)
+- **slb** (Simultaneous Launch Button) first seen at v0.2.0 via GoReleaser -- [`ee535ff`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/ee535ff05bfdb81cbf6b306c4630524d8cf1fce9)
+- **bv** (Beads Viewer) first seen at v0.13.0 via GoReleaser -- [`af9c0f9`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/af9c0f9e81de0a814f70bb760a5d2740cfdc5539)

-### CI / Infrastructure
+**Auto-update pipeline (new capability)**
 
-- Add CI test workflow (test-manifests.yml): JSON validation, required field checks, full install/version/uninstall test on Windows, version update checking against GitHub releases, log artifact upload — [`278b824`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/278b824f73234f7ed6668c629456670329eda376)
-- Add weekly scheduled tests and platform summaries — [`a32da14`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/a32da147ad2ff7a4134f008feb3fa111f4c53a7d)
-- Add auto-update workflow (auto-update.yml): repository_dispatch listener, manual workflow_dispatch, scheduled 6-hour fallback check, matrix job for all Scoop-compatible tools — [`68e7995`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/68e7995082f86d561884b55894166f339a7a0b02)
-- Add update-manifest.sh script for manual manifest version/hash updates — [`68e7995`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/68e7995082f86d561884b55894166f339a7a0b02)
+- Add `auto-update.yml` workflow: responds to `repository_dispatch` events from source repos, supports manual `workflow_dispatch`, runs a scheduled 6-hour fallback check with matrix jobs for all Scoop-compatible tools -- [`68e7995`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/68e7995082f86d561884b55894166f339a7a0b02)
+- Add `scripts/update-manifest.sh`: fetches new checksums from GitHub releases, updates version/hash/URL in manifest JSON files -- [`68e7995`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/68e7995082f86d561884b55894166f339a7a0b02)
 
-### Bug Fixes
+**Bug fixes (same day)**
 
-- Fix auto-update workflow: add URL update step — [`3602ebd`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/3602ebdb1ca1fba9f624895e34d228bc7e448fc6)
-- Fix update-manifest.sh: prevent spurious hash field in architecture-specific manifests — [`9c621e2`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/9c621e27bdc9bc332103dd58d1abd7c5e88fa418)
+- Fix auto-update workflow: URL was not being updated alongside version and hash, causing manifests to point at stale download URLs -- [`3602ebd`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/3602ebdb1ca1fba9f624895e34d228bc7e448fc6)
+- Fix `update-manifest.sh`: was unconditionally setting a top-level `hash` field, adding a spurious field to architecture-specific manifests (cass, xf); now checks manifest structure first -- [`9c621e2`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket/commit/9c621e27bdc9bc332103dd58d1abd7c5e88fa418)

-## 2025-12-14 — 2026-01-06 — Initial commits (ntm via GoReleaser)
+### 2025-12-14 to 2026-01-06 -- Repository bootstrap (ntm only)
